narrative:
Harrison County has 9,406 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a clear Republican lean of 6.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 33.5% of registrants.
